subtasks.description: Query spend data for Adobe and Microsoft products across all quarters of 2024 (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4). Calculate quarter-over-quarter spend change for each publisher and rank products within each publisher by Q4 spend.

plan.cost_rationale: Single sql_gen subtask assigned mid tier because: (1) The query requires multi-table joins across spend transactions and product/publisher dimensions; (2) window functions (LAG for QoQ calculation, RANK for product ranking) and aggregation (GROUP BY quarter and publisher/product); (3) filtering for two publishers and a full year (2024) with quarterly granularity. This is moderate complexity — not simple enough for small tier (which handles single tables), but does not require the advanced multi-CTE complexity of frontier. No cross-recon needed because all data sources from a single SQL warehouse. No separate cross_recon or policy_action because the query is purely analytical (compute QoQ change and rank), not governance or reconciliation.

output.sql: WITH quarterly_spend AS (SELECT cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.fiscal_quarter, SUM(cf.amount_usd) as quarter_spend FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher IN ('Adobe', 'Microsoft') AND cf.event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND cf.event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.fiscal_quarter), publisher_quarterly AS (SELECT publisher, fiscal_quarter, SUM(quarter_spend) as total_quarter_spend FROM quarterly_spend GROUP BY publisher, fiscal_quarter), qoq_change AS (SELECT pq1.publisher, pq1.fiscal_quarter, pq1.total_quarter_spend, LAG(pq1.total_quarter_spend) OVER (PARTITION BY pq1.publisher ORDER BY pq1.fiscal_quarter) as prev_quarter_spend, CASE WHEN LAG(pq1.total_quarter_spend) OVER (PARTITION BY pq1.publisher ORDER BY pq1.fiscal_quarter) IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(((pq1.total_quarter_spend - LAG(pq1.total_quarter_spend) OVER (PARTITION BY pq1.publisher ORDER BY pq1.fiscal_quarter)) / LAG(pq1.total_quarter_spend) OVER (PARTITION BY pq1.publisher ORDER BY pq1.fiscal_quarter) * 100)::NUMERIC, 2) ELSE NULL END as qoq_change_percent FROM publisher_quarterly pq1), product_rankings AS (SELECT qs.publisher, qs.product, qs.fiscal_quarter, qs.quarter_spend, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY qs.publisher, qs.fiscal_quarter ORDER BY qs.quarter_spend DESC) as product_rank FROM quarterly_spend qs) SELECT qc.publisher, qc.fiscal_quarter, qc.total_quarter_spend, qc.prev_quarter_spend, qc.qoq_change_percent, pr.product, pr.quarter_spend, pr.product_rank FROM qoq_change qc LEFT JOIN product_rankings pr ON qc.publisher = pr.publisher AND qc.fiscal_quarter = pr.fiscal_quarter ORDER BY qc.publisher, qc.fiscal_quarter, pr.product_rank
